headline: Palantir NHS Data Access Concerns Test Privacy Controls And Contract Prospects
summary: Reports indicate external contractors working on an NHS England data platform, including staff linked to Palantir (NasdaqGS:PLTR), had broad access to identifiable patient data. Internal NHS briefings reportedly described this access as "unlimited" for some external personnel involved in the project. The situation is raising questions about privacy controls, data governance and oversight of third party access to sensitive health records. Palantir, known for data analytics platforms used by...
